name: PATRIOT GOLD CORP
business: Patriot Gold Corp is a natural resource exploration company that focuses on acquiring, exploring, and developing natural resource properties. The company generated royalty revenue from the Moss Mine in 2024 but had no revenue in 2025 due to cessation of payments.

exposures.sentence: As a natural resource exploration company, our focus is to acquire, explore and develop natural resource properties which may host mineral reserves which may be economical to extract commercially.
